title: Why Brain Fog Gets Worse After 40 and the NAD+ Connection
author: Happy Aging Team
reviewer: Dr. Daniel Yadegar, MD, FACC, RPVI
tags: brain fog, NAD+, women over 40, cognitive function, perimenopause brain fog, mitochondria
meta_description: Brain fog after 40 is not just stress. Learn how declining NAD+ and estrogen combine to cloud thinking in perimenopause, and the 6-step protocol that actually helps.
